contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Wholesale page + PDP banners + alignment fixes (agroverse_shop)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/77
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/78
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/79
  
  Details:
  Built a retailer-funnel "Wholesale" page at /wholesale/ on agroverse.shop in response to feedback from Davi (Jupiter Row) who passed on stocking us because the site showed no packaging or shelf proof.
  
  What changed:
  - New /wholesale/index.html — packaging hero (front + back of bag), 5-bullet "why it sells" QR/traceability story, shelf-proof gallery from 8 USA partners, retail-pack pricing ($17/bag, MOQ 10, recommended retail $25–$35, US shipping included), bulk pointer to /quote-request/, USA stockist directory (27 shops linked to partner pages), lab/safety links, sample-pack and opening-order CTAs (mailto:community@agroverse.shop), and a corporate-gifting sub-CTA.
  - Thin "Selling Agroverse in your shop?" banner on all 11 PDPs linking to /wholesale/. Replaced 5 existing "Contact us for wholesale inquiries" notes; added banner to the 6 PDPs without one.
  - Footer link added to home, partners hub, and 33 of 34 partner pages.
  - Visual QA pass with Playwright at desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px). Found and fixed two alignment bugs: alternating-background sections had H2s drifted 32px (desktop) / 8px (mobile) due to .section.alt > * max-width vs padding mismatch — fixed with calc(1200px - 4rem); hero CTA buttons had unequal height because primary lacked a border to match the secondary's 2px white border — fixed with transparent 2px border on primary; lab-reports <ul> had inline margin-left overriding margin-left: auto — fixed.
  
  Why:
  - Closes the next layer of retailer-conversion gap that PR #76 left open: a future Davi can self-serve to "yes" without an email round-trip.
  - Pricing is published openly per Gary's call.
  - All CTAs route to community@agroverse.shop (no new alias).
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/77
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/78
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/79
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
